cards.back: A linear, sequential approach to software development where each phase is completed before moving on to the next one
An incremental, iterative approach to software development that emphasizes flexibility and collaboration among team members
A combination of waterfall and agile models that combines the predictability of waterfall with the flexibility of agile
A risk-driven approach to software development that involves iterative development, continuous review, and refinement, with a focus on minimizing risk
A model that involves adding new functionality or features to an existing system, rather than starting from scratch with a new project
